bestConditions: Hold time 0.0-1.2 hours (quick exits correlate with +2.8% avg wins vs -8.1% avg losses on longer holds)
Confidence 75-82 + oppScore 80-90 + organicScore >= 65 + bidask strategy (avg +4.41% wins: XRP +6.05%, SOULANA +7.82%, MIM-first +7.47%, wif2 +9.51%, ASTROID +5.07%)
Confidence 78-85 with oppScore 85+ AND organicScore >= 60 (win rate 58% vs 42% overall — organic filter matters)
Strategy: bid-ask with confidence 78+ (57% win rate vs 45% spot overall)
Pool reputation: ROCKET-SOL, milkers-SOL, BURNIE-SOL show 52-55% win rates
Exit via TRAILING_TP is the dominant winner path (40% of conf 75-82 winners exited this way, vs 2% of losers) — set TTP early, trust it
worstConditions: Confidence 75-82 + oppScore 80-90 + organicScore < 50 on unfamiliar pools (true catastrophic zone — losers avg organicScore 43.7 vs winners 62.6)
APR > 500% on conf 75-82 entries = likely rugpull/ponzi — pumphouse 1529% (-11%), BELIEF 1391% (-11%), Goku 6725% (-7%). Hard block.
Re-entering same pool within 24h of a winning trade (MIM-SOL pattern: +7.47% then -42.53% within 19h — second trade chases expired momentum)
Confidence 75-82 + SPOT strategy + null poolFeeApr/organicScore (catastrophic skew: 40 spot losers vs 25 spot winners; null-rate 51% losers vs 33% winners)
Confidence 85+ with oppScore 90+ on unfamiliar pools (CLAWD-SOL: -29.6%, -41.9%; Time-SOL: -32.6%)
Unknown pools with null confidence/oppScore but holdH=0.0 show extreme variance (-63.6%, -31.9%, -31.7% losses mixed with +67.8%, +46.5% wins)
New/low-liquidity pools (YOLO-SOL: -24.9%, Wcoin-SOL: -17.2%, GENZ-SOL early trades: -31%, -23%)

bestStrategy.name: bid-ask
bestStrategy.whyItWorks: Bid-ask trades with confidence 78+ show 57% win rate vs 45% spot. Bid-ask excels at capturing tight spreads on established pools (milkers-SOL, XRP-SOL, PEACE-SOL). Spot strategy suffers from entry timing uncertainty on volatile tokens.

optimalHoldHours.reasoning: Trades held 0.0-1.2 hours average +2.8% (wins). Trades held 1.5-3.0 hours average -2.1% (losses). Sweet spot is sub-1.2h exits—captures momentum before reversal. Longer holds expose to overnight/macro volatility on illiquid DLMM pools.

winningEntrySignals: Confidence 78-85 + oppScore 85-90 on established pools (ROCKET, milkers, BURNIE, NEU, GENZ, Tortellini)
Bid-ask strategy entry (57% win rate vs 45% spot)
Confidence 70 with null oppScore (intuitive quick trades: 56% win rate, avg +3.2%)
Hold duration <1.2 hours planned at entry
Pool has 5+ prior trades with >50% win rate in history
losingEntryMistakes: High confidence (85+) + high oppScore (90+) on NEW/UNFAMILIAR pools (CLAWD, Time, Yoshi, Freg, 44-SOL early trades)
Holding 0.2-0.8 hours on high-confidence entries—this is the 'false breakout' zone where reversals hit hardest
Entering bid-ask with confidence 75-80 (lower than optimal threshold)
Null confidence/oppScore with holdH=0.0 (data quality issue—agent trading blind, extreme variance)
Confidence 70 with null oppScore on UNFAMILIAR pools (vs. confidence 70 on known pools which wins 56%)

poolCharacteristics.reasoning: Pools with 5+ prior trades in history show 52-55% win rates. New pools (1-2 trades) show 38% win rate. Fee APR data unavailable, but established pools (ROCKET, milkers, BURNIE, NEU, GENZ, Tortellini, unc-SOL, DUMBMONEY-SOL) consistently outperform. Avoid: Yoshi, Freg, 44-SOL, stonks, Time, CLAWD, GENZ early, Wcoin, YOLO, BELIEF early trades.

confidenceCalibration: Agent is OVERCONFIDENT at 85+ on new pools. Confidence 85+ on unfamiliar tokens (CLAWD, Time, Yoshi) produces -29% to -50% losses. Sweet spot: confidence 78-85 on KNOWN pools, OR confidence 70 with null oppScore (intuitive quick trades). The agent's confidence is well-calibrated at 78-82 range but breaks down at 85+ without pool history. Recommendation: cap confidence at 82 for new pools, allow 85+ only after 5+ successful trades on that pool.
topInsight: HOLD TIME is the dominant predictor. Trades exiting at 0.0-1.2 hours average +2.8% (wins). Trades held 0.2-0.8 hours with high confidence (75-85) on unfamiliar pools trigger catastrophic -15% to -50% losses (Yoshi, Freg, 44-SOL, stonks, Time, CLAWD). The agent enters high-conviction trades on new pools, holds through the first reversal (0.2-0.8h window), and gets stopped out hard. Solution: implement aggressive 0.5-1.0h stop-loss on new pools, or reduce confidence threshold for new pools to 65-70.
suggestedRuleChanges: Add rule: IF pool has <5 prior trades AND confidence >= 85, REDUCE confidence to 72 and set hard stop-loss at -3% (not -5%)
Add rule: IF holdH planned > 1.5 hours, REDUCE opportunityScore by 10 points (long holds on DLMM are toxic)
Add rule: PREFER bid-ask strategy when confidence 78-85 (57% win rate vs 45% spot)
Add rule: IF confidence 70 AND oppScore null, ALLOW trade (intuitive quick trades win 56%); these are your best performers
Add rule: BLOCK trades on pools with <3 prior trades in last 7 days (Yoshi, Freg, 44-SOL, stonks, Time, CLAWD all new/illiquid)
Add rule: IF confidence >= 85 AND pool is new, set mandatory exit at +2% or -2% (don't let conviction override risk on unknowns)
Calibrate: confidence 78-82 is your optimal range (58% win rate); 85+ only on pools with 10+ successful prior trades
Add rule: IF pool had winning trade within last 24h, BLOCK re-entry to same pool for 24h cooldown (MIM-pattern: momentum doesn't repeat on <$10K TVL pools)
Add rule: IF poolFeeApr > 500%, HARD BLOCK — these are ponzi/rugpull APRs (pumphouse 1529%, BELIEF 1391%, Goku 6725% all lost 7-11%)
Add rule: IF null(organicScore) OR null(poolFeeApr), reduce confidence by 10 points — data-poor entries lose at 45% null-rate vs 26% for winners
tuningRationale: Part 23: Forensic analysis of 429-trade dataset revealed conf 75-82 rule was over-fitted. Winners (42) in same zone differentiated by organicScore (62.6 vs 43.7 losers). Rules rewritten specifically without restarting auto-learning pipeline (postTradeAnalyzer intentionally disabled per brain-paralysis prevention policy). MIM-SOL pattern isolated: same-pool re-entry within 24h of a win is the failure mode. APR > 500% flagged as rugpull signal.
